title: Indulgent Portuguese Almonds Cookies
description: Crunchy almond cookies infused with dark chocolate chips and a hint of Portuguese vanilla, ideal for keto-friendly indulgence.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut flour, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
In a separate bowl, cream softened butter with erythritol until light and fluffy.
Beat in vanilla extract to the butter mixture, then stir in the dry ingredients until a dough forms.
Fold in dark chocolate chips, ensuring even distribution.
Drop tablespoon-sized balls onto the prepared baking sheet and flatten slightly.
Bake for 10 minutes or until edges are golden brown and centers set.
Remove cookies and allow them to cool on the sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
